signature: static void ndpi_check_tinc(struct ndpi_detection_module_struct *ndpi_struct, struct ndpi_flow_struct *flow)
params: struct ndpi_detection_module_struct *ndpi_struct - detection module context; current packet in ndpi_struct->packet, TINC cache in ndpi_struct->tinc_cache
